title: selaginella atrivirens
intro: Selaginella atrivirens, also known as the Black Beeswing or Black Cliff Club Moss, is a type of evergreen perennial plant species belonging to the genus Selaginella in the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella atrivirens include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
